description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light beige fabric. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, complemented by two smaller, square side pillows. Its armrests are straight, moderately padded, and sit at the same height as the backrest, creating a clean-lined silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, dark-colored metal legs, which are slightly angled and positioned at the corners for stability. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, maintaining the overall sleek and contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears uniform and untextured, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and slim metal legs. The design is minimalist and sleek, with smooth, unpatterned upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and two small side pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the slim, angled metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the sofa's depth, cushion arrangement, and leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, with two smaller side pillows; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, moderately padded armrests at seat height, with a clean, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, dark metal legs, slightly angled and positioned at the corners; legs are exposed and have a minimalist, modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, uniform cushions; continuous and unadorned with no tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
